agents.name: architect
agents.description: Software Architect - Focus on system design, architectural patterns, design decisions, and complex backend logic

agents.name: backend-engineer
agents.description: Backend Engineer - Implements backend features, APIs, database operations, and services based on consultant/architect suggestions

agents.name: code-analyst
agents.description: Analyzes complex code to explain architecture, logic, data flow, and design patterns. Use when you need to understand unfamiliar codebases, trace execution paths, or decode intricate algorithms.

agents.name: frontend-engineer
agents.description: Frontend Engineer & UI/UX Specialist - Focus on user interfaces, React/Vue/Angular, accessibility, responsive design, and delightful user experiences

agents.name: junior-engineer
agents.description: Junior Engineer - Fast, focused implementation of small features, bug fixes, and straightforward tasks under 30 minutes

agents.name: performance-engineer
agents.description: Performance Optimization & Efficiency Specialist - Focus on profiling, benchmarking, algorithm optimization, and performance analysis

agents.name: security-expert
agents.description: Security & Cryptography Specialist - Focus on security audits, threat modeling, cryptography, authentication, authorization, and secure coding practices

skills.name: conventional-git-commit
skills.description: This skill MUST be loaded on every git commit without exception. It should also be used when the user asks to write a conventional commit, format a commit message, follow conventional commits spec, create a semantic commit, make a commit, commit changes, or git commit. Every commit message produced in this project MUST conform to this specification.
